title: BlockWorks
description: The BlockWorks mod adds a variety of blocks. Colorful or not.
body:
About
  
The BlockWorks mod adds a variety of blocks. Colourful or not. We are working on fabric support! I will update regularly so check back soon! This effects building in good ways, have you ever thought that that's just not the right shade of blue!? Well, BlockWorks have got you covered!

What we add
   
- Rainbow Planks
- Rainbow Stone
- Rainbow Grass
- 1.20 Features for 1.18.2 and 1.19.x
- 1.19 Features for 1.18.2
  
Future Updates

I am working on both forge and fabric for 1.20, but Fabric will come first. I am going to try work on every single version for Fabric and Forge, but some versions may be missed out due to the lack of time I have at the moment.
